# attachments

**Instance Property**

The attachments for a preview reply that provide additional data for the system to display the preview.

## Declaration

```swift
var attachments: [String : QLPreviewReplyAttachment] { get set }
```

## Discussion

When providing an HTML reply, use the string associated with the [doc://com.apple.quicklookui/documentation/QuickLookUI/QLPreviewReplyAttachment] prefixed with `cid:` to reference the content within the HTML.

## Inspecting a preview reply

- **title**: The title for the system to display with the preview.
- **stringEncoding**
